title: Improved Pillager Outpost
description: The "Improved Pillager Outpost" Datapack revamps the standard Minecraft Pillager Outpost into a challenging, multi-level tower. This overhaul adds detailed architecture, tougher enemies, and exclusive loot, creating a more immersive and rewarding experie

<center>

[![CurseForge-Mod][CurseForge-Mod]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/improved-pillager-outpost)
[![CurseForge-Datapack][CurseForge-Datapack]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/improved-pillager-outpost-datapack)

[CurseForge-Datapack]: https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1093291?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&label=Datapack&labelColor=212121&color=FF6D00

## Overview

The **Improved Pillager Outpost Mod/Datapack** completely transforms the standard Minecraft Pillager Outpost into a formidable, fully-realized tower. Designed to enhance your gameplay experience, this mod/datapack introduces a more immersive and detailed structure that adds depth to your adventures.

## Features

- **Overhauled Structure**: The traditional Pillager Outpost is replaced with a fully-constructed tower, featuring multiple floors, detailed architecture, and strategic layouts.
- **Four Tower Variants**:
  - **Normal**: A standard, well-maintained tower.
  - **Overgrown**: A tower reclaimed by nature, with vines and foliage covering its exterior.
  - **Damaged**: A battle-worn tower showing signs of past skirmishes.
  - **Overgrown Damaged**: A combination of both overgrown and damaged elements, giving the tower a unique, rugged appearance.
- **Two Top Tower Variations**:
  - **Active**: The top of the tower features a lit signal fire, indicating that the outpost is alert and ready for battle.
  - **Inactive**: The signal fire is extinguished, suggesting that the outpost is less vigilant.

- **Vanilla Loot Tables**: While the tower includes more chests than a standard outpost, the loot remains consistent with the vanilla game. No additional items have been added.
- **Unaltered Enemies**: The enemies within the tower are the same as in the vanilla game. No changes to enemy difficulty or behavior have been made—yet.

## Installation

### For Mod Installation

1. **Download the Mod**: [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/improved-pillager-outpost) | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/datapack/improved-pillager-outpost)
2. **Install with Your Preferred Mod Loader**:
   - **Forge/NeoForge**: Drag the mod file into the `mods` folder located in your `.minecraft` directory.
   - **Fabric/Quilt**: Ensure you have the Fabric API installed alongside the corresponding mod loader. Place the mod file into the `mods` folder.

### For Datapack Installation

1. **Download the Datapack**: [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/improved-pillager-outpost-datapack) | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/datapack/improved-pillager-outpost)
2. **Locate Your Minecraft Saves Folder**:
   - Windows: `%appdata%\.minecraft\saves`
   - Mac: `~/Library/Application Support/minecraft/saves`
   - Linux: `~/.minecraft/saves`
3. **Add the Datapack**:
   - Open the folder of the world you want to add the datapack to.
   - Drag and drop the downloaded `.zip` file into the `datapacks` folder.
4. **Load the Datapack**:
   - Start Minecraft and enter your world.
   - Use the `/reload` command if necessary.
   - Enjoy the newly transformed Pillager Outposts!

## Compatibility

- **Minecraft Version**: This mod/datapack is compatible with Minecraft version 1.16.5+.
- **Mod Loaders**: Supports Forge, NeoForge, Fabric (with Fabric API), and Quilt (with Fabric API).
- **Multiplayer Support**: Fully compatible with multiplayer servers.

## Usage

- **Raiding the Tower**: Explore the new Pillager Tower, which offers a more complex layout with multiple chests to discover. Be prepared for the same vanilla enemies, but in a more challenging environment.
- **Loot and Rewards**: Although the loot tables are unchanged, the increased number of chests provides more opportunities to gather resources.

## Feedback and Support

If you encounter any issues or have suggestions for improvements, please contact us via [Discord](https://discord.gg/EKyjXRH9xN).

Thank you for using the Improved Pillager Outpost Mod/Datapack! Enjoy a more exciting and detailed Minecraft experience.
